programme.title: Love shooting
programme.desc: Charlie è un produttore cinematografico che si lascia convincere a realizzare un film su Benjamin Disraeli, a patto che il protagonista sia un attore di grande fama che però verrà rapito, costringendo Charlie ad escogitare una soluzione creativa.

programme.title: Guerra al virus
programme.desc: America anni '80. Il dottor Francis è uno dei primi a scoprire il virus dell'Hiv, ma la società americana rimane indifferente alla malattia considerandola pericolosa solo per gli omosessuali.

programme.title: Fatalità
programme.desc: Con Nino D'Angelo, la storia di un uomo alla ricerca della felicità. Nino ha lasciato la famiglia per un'avventuriera che lo ha illuso e poi abbandonato. Proprio quando le cose tornano a girare per il meglio farà una fatale scoperta.

programme.title: Nell
programme.desc: Nell è una ragazza che vive insieme alla madre sorda, isolata dal mondo, in un cottage nella foresta. Dopo la morte della madre, viene scoperta da Jerome, il medico locale. È affascinato da lei, dal momento che parla un linguaggio incompresibile.

programme.title: L'amore non basta IT
programme.desc: Martina è un'assistente di volo. Durante un volo conosce Angelo, un ragazzo timido e introverso che come lei vive in un piccolo paese dell'Abruzzo. Scopriranno invece di conoscersi da molto tempo.

programme.title: Half Nelson
programme.desc: Candidatura agli Oscar per Ryan Gosling. Dan è un insegnante di scuola pubblica, brillante e capace di motivare i suoi allievi nonostante le difficoltà della vita di periferia. Nel privato però affoga i suoi tormenti nell'abuso di alcool e droghe.

programme.title: L'infiltrato - 10th and Wolf
programme.desc: Un sergente della Marina scopre i legami della propria famiglia con il crimine organizzato. L'unica cosa che l'uomo può fare è tentare di salvare il fratello e il cugino. Un thriller ad alta tensione con il grande Dennis Hopper.

programme.title: Ingenious
programme.desc: Matt, piccolo inventore, continua a mettere a punto prodotti intelligenti ma senza mercato. Sam, suo amico e partner d'affari, è un venditore nato. Quando a Matt arriva un'idea brillante l'aiuto di Sam si renderà indispensabile.

programme.title: Ingenious
programme.desc: Matt, piccolo inventore, continua a mettere a punto prodotti intelligenti ma senza mercato. Sam, suo amico e partner d'affari, è un venditore nato. Quando a Matt arriva un'idea brillante l'aiuto di Sam si renderà indispensabile.

programme.title: Vendetta - Una storia d'amore
programme.desc: Un veterano della Guerra del Golfo (Nicolas Cage), decide di vendicare una donna che dopo essere stata stuprata, ha visto i suoi aggressori rimessi in libertà.

programme.title: Vendetta - Una storia d'amore
programme.desc: Un veterano della Guerra del Golfo (Nicolas Cage), decide di vendicare una donna che dopo essere stata stuprata, ha visto i suoi aggressori rimessi in libertà.

programme.title: Poeti dall'inferno
programme.desc: Verlaine, poeta già affermato, legge i lavori del giovanissimo Rimbaud e ne coglie subito l'eccezionale valore. Quando conosce l'autore, se ne innamora perdutamente.

programme.title: Poeti dall'inferno
programme.desc: Verlaine, poeta già affermato, legge i lavori del giovanissimo Rimbaud e ne coglie subito l'eccezionale valore. Quando conosce l'autore, se ne innamora perdutamente.

programme.title: Otto secondi di gloria
programme.desc: Pellicola biografica sulla vita di Lane Frost, celebre campione del rodeo. Dalla gioventù, quando Lane, grazie agli insegnamenti del padre, inizia a frequentare le gare, fino a diventare il migliore del mondo.

programme.title: Otto secondi di gloria
programme.desc: Pellicola biografica sulla vita di Lane Frost, celebre campione del rodeo. Dalla gioventù, quando Lane, grazie agli insegnamenti del padre, inizia a frequentare le gare, fino a diventare il migliore del mondo.

programme.title: La sera di tutti i giorni
programme.sub-title: La sera di tutti i giorni
programme.desc: La sera di tutti i giorni, il film diretto da Felix Tissi, racconta storie slegate ma unite dal tema della vecchiaia, attraverso i temi dell'amore e della morte.

programme.title: La sera di tutti i giorni
programme.sub-title: La sera di tutti i giorni
programme.desc: La sera di tutti i giorni, il film diretto da Felix Tissi, racconta storie slegate ma unite dal tema della vecchiaia, attraverso i temi dell'amore e della morte.

programme.title: Darling Companion - Un caro compagno
programme.desc: Una mattina Beth salva un cane randagio e, nonostante il parere contrario del marito Joseph, decide di tenerlo con sé instaurandovi un legame speciale per compensare la solitudine della propria vita matrimoniale. Con Diane Keaton.

programme.title: Darling Companion - Un caro compagno
programme.desc: Una mattina Beth salva un cane randagio e, nonostante il parere contrario del marito Joseph, decide di tenerlo con sé instaurandovi un legame speciale per compensare la solitudine della propria vita matrimoniale. Con Diane Keaton.

programme.title: Big Baby
programme.desc: Uno scienziato inventa una macchina che agisce sui geni e trasforma il nipote di quattro anni in un adulto. Quando Bobby scappa di casa, i suoi fratelli devono riuscire a trovarlo prima del ritorno dei genitori. Il tempo stringe, rimane un solo giorno!

programme.title: Big Baby
programme.desc: Uno scienziato inventa una macchina che agisce sui geni e trasforma il nipote di quattro anni in un adulto. Quando Bobby scappa di casa, i suoi fratelli devono riuscire a trovarlo prima del ritorno dei genitori. Il tempo stringe, rimane un solo giorno!

programme.title: Davanti agli occhi
programme.desc: All'approssimarsi dell'anniversario di una fatale sparatoria in un liceo, Diana è ossessionata dai ricordi della tragedia. Nonostante ciò è riuscita a mettere su una bella famiglia e una vita quasi idilliaca, che però minaccia di essere turbata.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: At Stowe School in Buckinghamshire, featured items include an MBE awarded to a surgeon who operated on George VI.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona and the team return to Scarborough Spa Pavilion where finds include a paperweight from Churchill's desk.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona and the team return to RAF Marham in Norfolk where finds include a statue of Buddha.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team head to Polesden Lacey in Surrey and discover a valuable rat deterrent, a glove believed to have belonged to Elizabeth I, and a brooch which was kept hidden for years whilst the owner was in a prisoner of war camp.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: A return visit to Wightwick Manor near Wolverhampton for Fiona Bruce and the experts; discoveries include two drawings made by one of Britain's greatest artists JMW Turner.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team are at Eastbourne Bandstand; family treasures featured include a collection of pottery with a moving story.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the experts pay a second visit to East Sussex as they welcome thousands of visitors to Eastbourne Bandstand.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Objects include artifacts relating to the Nuremberg trials at the end of World War II.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the experts pay a second visit to East Sussex as they welcome thousands of visitors to Eastbourne Bandstand; objects include rare spoons found in pig swill and a bangle left behind by a Russian Princess.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Objects include what could be the most valuable picture ever seen on the show, and a tea caddy.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the experts pay a visit to Newstead Abbey; among the discoveries are a medal for bravery awarded to a pigeon in World War Two.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team arrive at Towneley Hall near Burnley in Lancashire; despite heavy rain, thousands arrive to show their family treasures.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team arrive at Towneley Hall near Burnley in Lancashire; despite heavy rain, thousands arrive to show their family treasures.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.sub-title: The Scottish National Gallery of Modern Art
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team head to Scotland where a large crowd awaits the experts at the National Gallery of Modern Art in Edinburgh; objects include a small carved ivory figure from the 18th century and an original manuscript by Robert Burns.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow

programme.desc: Fiona Bruce looks back on the most talked about finds of 2013 with updates on star items from the year.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team visit the Royal Ballet School at Richmond Park in London; objects brought to camera include exquisitely modeled porcelain figures made by ballerina Anna Pavlova and a long bow reputed to have been used in World War II.

programme.desc: Objects include the death mask of William Gladstone and a complete kitchen from the 1950s.

programme.title: La fiebre del Jade
programme.desc: no info available

programme.title: La Fiebre del Jade: Ve Al Fondo
programme.desc: Claudia trae un gran equipo de perforación y tiene sólo cuatro días para encontrar el mejor jade, pero ella y Robin no pueden decidir dónde buscar.

programme.title: La Fiebre del Jade: Padre e Hijos
programme.desc: Los chicos chocan cuando un empujón de finales de temporada los hace trabajar en dos minas a la vez.

programme.title: La Fiebre del Jade: Todo Ese Brillo Es Jade
programme.desc: El equipo quita rocas de jade de la lente J, pero un gran problema en la carretera amenaza todo.

programme.title: La Fiebre del Jade: La fiebre del jade
programme.desc: Cuando la perforación de prueba de Claudia y Robin en busca de jade se queda vacía.

programme.title: La Fiebre del Jade: Tengo una cuerda
programme.desc: Claudia, Robin y la tripulación se apresuran a llevar su equipo pesado a una montaña antes de que los ríos crecientes lo hagan imposible.

programme.title: La Fiebre del Jade: La larga marcha
programme.desc: Las tensiones aumentan mientras la tripulación lucha por llevar equipo pesado por un sendero de 120 km lleno de barro y rocas.

programme.title: La Fiebre del Jade: Pendiente resbaladiza
programme.desc: La tripulación intenta llevar su maquinaria a través de ríos crecientes para instalar su nueva mina de jade en la cima de la montaña.

programme.title: La Fiebre del Jade: Al escondite

programme.title: Noryang
programme.desc: Inverno del 1598, la storia dell'ultima battaglia navale di Yi Sun-shin durante l'invasione giapponese della Corea, avvenuta nello stretto di Noryang.

programme.title: Mathilde
programme.desc: Nel crepuscolo della Russia imperiale dei Romanov, la prima ballerina Matilda Kshesinskaya diventa l'amante di tre Granduchi fino a quando incontra il futuro Nicola II.

programme.title: T-34 Eroi D'Acciaio
programme.desc: Nel 1944, un coraggioso gruppo di soldati russi riuscì a fuggire dalla prigionia tedesca in un leggendario carro armato T-34 semidistrutto. Erano tempi di coraggio indimenticabile, feroci combattimenti, amore e miracoli leggendari.

programme.title: Amori di mezzo secolo
programme.desc: A scandire il tempo è la guerra e gli amori che provano a sfidarla. Cinque intrecci sentimentali che percorrono la storia, lungo un arco di trent'anni che copre Prima e Seconda Guerra Mondiale.

programme.title: Altamira
programme.desc: Nel 1879 Maria e suo padre archeologo scoprono in una caverna antichi dipinti preistorici. La madre, appoggiata dalla Chiesa, li vede come un attacco alla Bibbia. Maria resta divisa tra due mondi, senza modelli di riferimento, alla ricerca della verità

programme.title: The Legionary - Fuga all'inferno
programme.desc: Alain è un pugile che deve fuggire da Marsiglia per essersi rifiutato di vendere un incontro. Siamo negli anni Venti, e la sua unica possibilità di fuga è il reclutamento nella Legione Straniera.

programme.title: L'infiltrato - 10th and Wolf
programme.desc: Un sergente della Marina scopre i legami della propria famiglia con il crimine organizzato. L'unica cosa che l'uomo può fare è tentare di salvare il fratello e il cugino. Un thriller ad alta tensione con il grande Dennis Hopper.

programme.title: Archangel
programme.desc: Mosca. Lo storico Luke Kelso incontra un ex soldato della milizia sovietica che gli comunica l'esistenza di un segreto di Stalin custodito nella città russa di Arcangelo. Quando il militare viene misteriosamente assassinato, Kelso inizia a indagare.

programme.title: Archangel
programme.desc: Mosca. Lo storico Luke Kelso incontra un ex soldato della milizia sovietica che gli comunica l'esistenza di un segreto di Stalin custodito nella città russa di Arcangelo. Quando il militare viene misteriosamente assassinato, Kelso inizia a indagare.

programme.title: The Pirate
programme.desc: Il pirata greco che divenne uomo d'affari, Ioannis Varvakis, fece fortuna vendendo caviale in Russia e in tutto il mondo. Varvakis lotta per tutta la vita per la libertà per se stesso e poi per il suo paese...

programme.title: The Pirate
programme.desc: Il pirata greco che divenne uomo d'affari, Ioannis Varvakis, fece fortuna vendendo caviale in Russia e in tutto il mondo. Varvakis lotta per tutta la vita per la libertà per se stesso e poi per il suo paese...

programme.title: IL RE VICHINGO
programme.desc: Europa del Nord, XIIIsec. Il crociato Max von Buxhoveden vuole distruggere le credenze pagane dei popoli del nord. La resa sembra cosa fatta quando in punto di morte il re cede il suo anello, simbolo del potere, al nipote Namejs cresciuto tra i cristiani.

programme.title: IL RE VICHINGO
programme.desc: Europa del Nord, XIIIsec. Il crociato Max von Buxhoveden vuole distruggere le credenze pagane dei popoli del nord. La resa sembra cosa fatta quando in punto di morte il re cede il suo anello, simbolo del potere, al nipote Namejs cresciuto tra i cristiani.

programme.title: Il Federale
programme.desc: Nel 1944 un graduato delle brigate nere è incaricato di catturare un professore antifascista e di condurlo dall'Abruzzo a Roma. Il viaggio di ritorno si rivela complicato, tra incidenti, bombardamenti, agguati partigiani e incursioni tedesche.

programme.title: Top Gear: Avsnitt 2
programme.desc: Matt LeBlanc och Chris Harris tävlar i de allra senaste supercabrioleterna från den brännheta öknen till snöklädda berg. David Tennant kör den rimligt prissatta bilen.

programme.title: Top Gear: Avsnitt 3
programme.desc: Matt LeBlancs granskning av Aston Martin DB11 omintetgörs av Chris Harris och en djävulsk Mercedes. Rory går på jakt efter superbilar på Tysklands skrämmande racerbana Nurburgring.

programme.title: Top Gear: Avsnitt 4
programme.desc: Chris Harris försöker korsa Arabiska halvön snabbare än Matt LeBlanc, medan rapstjärnan Tinie Tempah ger sig i kast med Top Gear-banan i den rimligt snabba Toyota GT86.

programme.title: Top Gear: Avsnitt 5
programme.desc: Medan Matt testar Amerikas explosiva nya superbil, Ford GT, kör Chris och Sabine ikapp med jeepar i Kaliforninens öken.

programme.title: Top Gear: Avsnitt 6
programme.desc: Chris Harris och Rory Reid reser genom Kuba i ett par begagnade sportbilar, medan komikern Ross Noble ger sig ut på Top Gear-banan i den rimligt prissatta bilen.

programme.title: Top Gear: Avsnitt 7
programme.desc: Matt LeBlanc kör ett åttahjuligt fordon som räddats från Ryssland, medan Rory förvandlar världens fulaste bil till en lyxig justjakt.

programme.title: Top Gear: Avsnitt 1
programme.desc: Matt, Chris och Rory ger sig ut på en bilresa genom Amerikas Vilda västern i de allra senaste V8-sportbilarna från McLaren, Jaguar och Ford. På banan ser vi Rob Brydon som stjärnan i en rimligt snabb bil.

programme.title: Top Gear: Avsnitt 2
programme.desc: Matt LeBlanc och Chris Harris beger sig in i Kaliforniens skogar för att testa terrängleksaker och leta efter Big Foot. Rory Reid uppfinner sporten kappkörning med omvänd kamera, medan Chris testar den nya McLaren 720S. Lee Mack är studiogäst.

programme.title: Top Gear: Avsnitt 3
programme.desc: Matt LeBlanc och Chris Harris köper begagnade sportbilar på auktion för en lång bilresa genom Honshu, medan Rory har en natt på sig att upptäcka den bisarraste bilkulturen som Tokyo har att erbjuda.

programme.title: Top Gear: Avsnitt 4
programme.desc: Matt LeBlanc provkör världens snabbast accelererande bil, med lite hjälp från NASA. Chris Harris skriver ett innerligt kärleksbrev till Citroen 2CV, medan Rory Reid prövar på några spännande bilar från Sydkorea. Dara O Briain och Ed Byrne är studiogäster.

programme.title: Top Gear: Avsnitt 5
programme.desc: Matt och Chris försöker sätta fart på brittiska vägar - och brittiskt jordbruk. Matt provkör också den blixstrande snabba Ferrari 812 Superfast, medan Rory Reid beger sig till USA för att ta sig an en muskelbil som förbjudits i Europa.

programme.title: Top Gear: Avsnitt 6
programme.desc: Matt LeBlanc, Chris Harris och Rory Reid provkör de allra senaste SUV:arna med hjälp av hästtävlingar. Chris får sig också en explosiv körtur i den nya Alpine A110. Jason Manford är studiogäst.

programme.title: Top Gear: Avsnitt 1
programme.desc: James May pratar om sin älskade Bentley, och föredetta fotbollsspelaren, numera skådespelaren Vinnie Jones tar sig an Top Gear-banan.

programme.title: Barbie Dreamtopia special Festival of Fun
programme.sub-title: Barbie Dreamtopia special Festival of Fun
programme.desc: ¡Acompaña a Barbie y Chelsea en su viaje por Dreamtopia! Desde Dulciudad hasta la Montaña Brillante, vivirán mágicas aventuras repletas de fantasía, amistad y diversión.

programme.title: Barbie: Vlogger
programme.desc: Incluye episodios: Encontrar tu voz / Friend Tag con Renee / Juego «Me voy de viaje» con Stacie / Lugares a los que Barbie sueña con viajar / El perdón / Datos curiosos de animales con Chelsea / Ayuda a salvar los océanos

programme.title: Barbie: My First Barbie
programme.desc: Malibu, Brooklyn, Teresa y Renée preparan la mayor fiesta sorpresa para Chelsea. Pero cuando los deseos se descontrolan, la magia de la Casa de los Sueños causa caos. ¿Podrán Barbie y sus amigas salvar el Día de Ensueño?

programme.title: Barbie Dreamtopia series
programme.sub-title: Un bosque de amistad / Berry, un Ositofresa único
programme.desc: Chelsea y sus amigos cooperan en Dreamtopia para salvar al Árbol Parlante con trabajo en equipo.

programme.title: Barbie: Life in the City
programme.sub-title: Barbie: Life in the City EP1
programme.desc: Únete a Barbie “Brooklyn” Roberts y sigue su nuevo blog online en Nueva York

programme.title: The Barbie Band
programme.desc: The Barbie Band: canciones, baile y mucha amistad.

programme.title: Barbie Dreamtopia series
programme.sub-title: El libro de los hechizos dañado / El concierto entre las nubes
programme.desc: Chelsea ayuda a Notto a corregir su error y le enseña la importancia de cuidar las cosas de los demás.

programme.title: Barbie Summer Adventure
programme.desc: ¡Llega el verano! Malibu, Brooklyn, Skipper, Stacie y Chelsea celebran el fin de las clases con diversión sin límites.

programme.title: Barbie: Vlogger
programme.desc: Incluye episodios: El reflejo del «perdón» / Algoritmos en la vida real / Reto de yoga / Bálsamo labial casero (DIY) / Abejas y miel / Reto de baile / Tour de mi habitación nueva / Reto de los 7 segundos / ¿Qué es el «Dream Gap»?

programme.title: Barbie Dreamtopia series
programme.sub-title: Una fiesta electrizante / En busca del tesoro perdido
programme.desc: Chelsea sueña con Dreamtopia, donde la electricidad estática crea caos. Con Barbie, aprende a aceptar lo inesperado y disfrutar el momento.

programme.title: Barbie: Vlogger
programme.desc: Incluye episodios: Tutorial de maquillaje de león con Ken / Nunca es demasiado pronto para tener voz / Modelos a seguir del Dream Gap / Tutorial de Skipper: tarjeta de felicitación navideña / Reto «¿Qué hay en la caja?» / Sé fiel a ti misma

programme.title: Barbie: Life in the City
programme.sub-title: Barbie: Life in the City EP2
programme.desc: El arte callejero de Nueva York me ha inspirado increíbles nuevos peinados

programme.title: Barbie Dream Besties
programme.desc: ¡Ven a conocer a las Dream Besties!

programme.title: Barbie: Vlogger
programme.sub-title: Dedos chasqueando los dedos y alzando la voz
programme.desc: ¡Decidí probar a bailar con los dedos y es superdivertido!. ¿Sabes hacer algo especial con las manos?

programme.title: Barbie Dreamtopia series
programme.sub-title: Todo en su sitio / Las olimpiadas capilares del bosque alegre
programme.desc: Chelsea pone orden en el Bosque Alegre y aprende la importancia de ser organizada.

programme.title: Barbie: Vlogger
programme.desc: Episodios: Vlog invitado con la reina Amelia / Dibujo mi vida / Celebrar el Año Nuevo Lunar con Renee / Moda DIY / ¡El vlog y el videoclip de Taffy! / El reto de 24 horas de Ken

programme.title: Barbie: Vlogger
programme.desc: Episodios: Mudanza a mi nueva residencia / El vlog de Brooklyn en Harlem / Tarjetas de agradecimiento con flores prensadas / Cápsula del tiempo / Barbie habla sobre la empatía / Tutorial de baile con Malibu y Brooklyn / Brooklyn cocina con su padre

programme.title: Barbie Dreamtopia series
programme.sub-title: La noche de las cometas voladoras / Los juegos de la Bahía del Arcoíris
programme.desc: Chelsea y Barbie ayudan a Notto a reparar su cometa y aprenden el valor de la amistad.

programme.title: Fashion Stories
programme.desc: Barbie y sus amigas viven aventuras llenas de moda y creatividad. Entre pasarelas y diseños, aprenden que el mejor estilo es ser auténtico y brillar con confianza.

programme.title: Barbie Dream Squad, Troop Rainbow
programme.desc: Barbie y sus amigas forman el Dream Squad en el Campamento Rainbow, donde la amistad, la creatividad y la confianza se unen para superar desafíos y descubrir el poder de los sueños. ¡Una aventura llena de color, música y diversión!

programme.title: Barbie Dreamtopia series
programme.sub-title: El desfile de Dulciudad / La estatua de Sir Queso
programme.desc: Chelsea organiza un desfile en Dulciudad y aprende el poder del trabajo en equipo.

programme.title: Dream Magic
programme.desc: Barbie y sus amigas viven aventuras mágicas llenas de luz y fantasía. En cada misión descubren que la verdadera magia nace del corazón, la amistad y la confianza en uno mismo.

programme.title: Barbie Dreamtopia series
programme.sub-title: Pequeños problemas brillantes / Un unicornio entre las nubes
programme.desc: Chelsea cuida los huevos de las Esferas Brillantes y descubre lo que significa ser responsable.

programme.title: The FBI Files: The True Story of Mississippi Burning
programme.sub-title: The True Story of Mississippi Burning
programme.desc: Philadelphia, Mississippi, 1964. A sleepy southern town steeped in tradition finds itself targeted for invasion.

programme.title: The FBI Files: A Model Killer
programme.desc: It's a model's job to rivet the public's attention. But in 1984, some aspiring models began attracting publicity in a terrible new way.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Hired Gun
programme.desc: When three people were found murdered in their home, it appeared like a burglary gone awry. But a crime this horrific deserved a closer look.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Cat and Mouse
programme.desc: He was a predator, abducting girls and young women from their own front yards in broad daylight. He was a sadist: phoning one victim's family, taunting them, boosting then dashing their hope, and he wouldn't stop until we stopped him.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Cracking The Cartel
programme.desc: A mother and child are kidnapped a bystander is murdered. Violence such as this shattered a quiet Texas neighborhood and exposed a drug cartel that flourished where it was least expected.

programme.title: The FBI Files: A Stranger in Town
programme.desc: She appeared on the highway in the spring, a young woman, her life cut short, her past and her identity a mystery. Only by finding out who she was could we ever hope to find her killer.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Hunter's Game
programme.desc: In the 1970s and 80s, people went to Alaska looking for a fresh start, to reinvent themselves, or to disappear for a while. Some of those disappearances weren't by choice.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Dixie Mafia
programme.desc: On Mississippi's Gulf Coast, a Judge and his politician wife are murdered in their home. The killer left few clues. It looked like a professional hit, and the investigation led nowhere. But the FBI refused to give up.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Shattered Shield
programme.desc: In a city awash in narcotics the drug lords have all the power even over the police. Corruption in New Orleans grew like cancer, eating away at public safety and threatening to destroy the city. Crooked cops break the laws they were sworn to uphold.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Blood Brothers
programme.desc: When the small community of Noel, Missouri discovered their bank was robbed, they're shocked. When the bank president turned up missing, they're outraged. And when clues began to surface the facts were more terrible than anyone could have guessed.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Crime Spree
programme.desc: They swept through six states like a plague, thrill killers acting without rhyme or reason. They targeted adults and young girls, kidnapping, and murdering. And in their rampage, they left plenty of clues, but moving targets are the hardest to hit.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Family Secrets
programme.desc: A woman and her infant son vanish. The husband is frantic. The clues are scarce, but hopes linger, even as the hours and days tick by without a word. Was she on the run, or the victim of foul play?

programme.title: The FBI Files: Master Plan
programme.desc: Willow Springs, Illinois, seemed like any other quiet Midwestern community. But it was really one of the most corrupt places in the nation. This tiny village, nestled just outside of Chicago, was in the hip pocket of organized crime.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Firefight
programme.desc: In Miami, a gang of robbers targeted banks and armored cars. They carried assault weapons and weren't afraid to use them. They struck during the day, and sometimes twice a day. For awhile, they seemed unstoppable.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Killer Abroad
programme.desc: Beginning in 1990, Europe found itself in the clutches of a serial killer. He became an international outlaw, hopping from country to country to evade capture and to kill again.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Killer Abroad
programme.desc: Beginning in 1990, Europe found itself in the clutches of a serial killer. He became an international outlaw, hopping from country to country to evade capture and to kill again.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Moving Target
programme.desc: When a sniper in Utah started targeting African-American men for death, authorities launched a massive investigation. With scant clues and no witnesses they found the odds stacked against them, and they had no idea where the killer would strike next.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Moving Target
programme.desc: When a sniper in Utah started targeting African-American men for death, authorities launched a massive investigation. With scant clues and no witnesses they found the odds stacked against them, and they had no idea where the killer would strike next.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Deadly Mission
programme.desc: When a family was murdered in Arkansas, it seemed like an isolated event. But soon the crime was revealed to be part of an ever-widening circle of violence that defined a new age of domestic terrorism.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Deadly Mission
programme.desc: When a family was murdered in Arkansas, it seemed like an isolated event. But soon the crime was revealed to be part of an ever-widening circle of violence that defined a new age of domestic terrorism.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Cop Killer
programme.desc: In 1995, our nation's capital was also our nation's murder capital. Even the police weren't safe. While Washington, DC, law enforcement targeted criminals, the criminals targeted law enforcement, even gunning down officers on patrol.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Cop Killer
programme.desc: In 1995, our nation's capital was also our nation's murder capital. Even the police weren't safe. While Washington, DC, law enforcement targeted criminals, the criminals targeted law enforcement, even gunning down officers on patrol.

programme.title: The FBI Files: .22 Caliber Killer
programme.desc: In Buffalo, New York, a sniper targeted African-American men. He held a city hostage, and threatened to ignite a racial powder keg. And it looked like others might be following his bloody example.

programme.desc: In Buffalo, New York, a sniper targeted African-American men. He held a city hostage, and threatened to ignite a racial powder keg. And it looked like others might be following his bloody example.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Polly Klaas: Kidnapped

programme.title: Ein Fall für TKKG - Drachenauge

programme.title: Robosapien – Mein Freund Cody

programme.title: Final Fight
programme.desc: Am Ende des Zweiten Weltkriegs werden amerikanische Soldaten von den chinesischen Behörden als Helden begrüßt. In einer kleinen Stadt in Shandong in der Nähe einer US-Basis herrschen einige Marinesoldaten, über sie und werfen die Bevölkerung in Terror.

programme.title: Shaolin Kickers
programme.desc: In dieser überkomischen Komödie versucht ein Team von Sonderlingen seinen besten Schuss bei einer Meisterschaft, indem sie Kampfkunst und Fußball kombinieren. Mit ihrem unorthodoxen Spiel treten sie dem gefürchteten Team Evil im Endspiel entgegen.

programme.sub-title: From Dusk Till Dawn 3: The Hangman'S Daughter

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Bullet With My Name On It
programme.sub-title: Bullet With My Name On It
programme.desc: In his first year on the force, rookie patrol officer Joe Kenda quickly learns the ropes. But when he tries to singlehandedly stop a brawling mob, he finds himself facing down gunfire.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Written in Blood
programme.desc: A community is shocked when Antoine McKenzie is brazenly shot outside an auto parts store in broad daylight. The only lead left for Lt. Joe Kenda is a final message written in the victim’s own blood.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: The Shoelace Killer
programme.desc: A party on the outskirts of the city turns into a nightmare for some teenagers when they discover a woman’s corpse.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Razor’s Edge
programme.desc: When police find 24-year-old Patrick Ray with a gunshot to the temple, the scene has all the telltale signs of suicide. But Lt. Joe Kenda's instinct says otherwise.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: The Uninvited Guest
programme.desc: A soldier is stabbed to death at a drive-thru. Kenda’s only clue is that this is somehow tied to a breakdancing competition.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Eye of the Beholder
programme.desc: Kenda encounters one of the most horrendous crime scenes of his career, but his hunt for a homicidal maniac leads him to the most unexpected of killers.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: The Invisible Hand of Death
programme.desc: Two teens stumble upon a woman engulfed in flames, leaving detectives to wonder just who in her inner circle could kill so cruelly.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Murder Bites
programme.desc: A young woman is found naked and strangled in a park not 200 yards from her home. It isn’t until Lt. Joe Kenda rethinks the entire case that he realizes someone has been lying.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Last Call for Murder
programme.desc: Five people are shot in a cold-blooded robbery. With much of the evidence lost in a fire set by the suspect. An exhaustive manhunt ends in a chilling confrontation with an Eagle Scout turned killer.

programme.desc: After a husband and wife are viciously attacked in their own home, Kenda is on the hunt for a troubled teen whose appetite for violence knows no bounds.

programme.desc: When a young army vet is found stabbed to death on his living room floor, suspicions quickly fall to a neighbor who was arrested during a nearby altercation.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Blood Relative
programme.desc: After a father is found shot in front of his home, Kenda uncovers a vengeful motive behind a deadly family feud.

programme.desc: Mother of 3 Dianne Hood is shot to death by a masked gunman on her way home from a Lupus support meeting. Joe Kenda uncovers a sordid web of lust and greed, revealing a killer no one ever expected.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Bill Nye, “the Science Guy” stops by to show a science experiment using baking soda and vinegar to blow up a balloon. Mister Rogers shows a video of dump trucks at a construction site, and in Make-Believe, all that was lost is found.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.sub-title: Be Yourself: Visit with David Copperfield
programme.desc: Magician David Copperfield teaches Mister Rogers how to do a magic trick. It takes lots of practice. In Make-Believe, X is giving flying lessons, and there's a video of what the world looks like from a bird's point of view.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.sub-title: Visit with the Uptown String Quartet
programme.desc: Prince Tuesday is upset about being unable to fly, so Lady Elaine gives him a propeller hat. He jumps off the castle wall, thinking the hat will make him fly, and injures his arm. Mister Rogers visits the Uptown String Quartet.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: X says he is feeling guilty about Prince Tuesday's fall. Neighbor Aber says it was not X's flying lessons that made Prince Tuesday get hurt. Mister Rogers shows a video about people making sleeping bags. He visits the workshop of the doll maker.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.sub-title: Feeling Good About Who We Are
programme.desc: Hula-hoop expert Paul Tifford gives Mister Rogers some lessons. It takes a lot of practice to be able to use a hula-hoop well, and falling and getting up again are a part of learning!

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.sub-title: Mister Rogers Puts on a Vest!
programme.desc: Instead of changing into a sweater as he typically does, Mister Rogers puts on a vest made by his friend Saihou Njie. Trolley brings a batik cloth to Handyman Negri, who then gives it to King Friday.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers arrives with a children's plastic potty, takes it to his bathroom and compares it to the adult-sized toilet. Prince Tuesday comes up with a game using a bucket but has had his feelings hurt when his father was not impressed.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: King Friday denounces the magic finder balloon. Neighbors Aber and Robert Troll are looking for Lady Elaine. They find her locked in a room of the Museum-Go-Round. At Mister Rogers' house, Levar Burton reads “The Daddy Book.”

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers explains how a wheelchair lift works, and then shows one in action. He shows some of his puppets. Mayor Maggie and Neighbor Aber ride in a wheelchair until they have their checkups from Dr. Bill.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.sub-title: Field Trip to Visit Koko the Gorilla
programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits with Koko the gorilla, who has learned how to communicate in sign language. In Make-Believe, there's a gorilla, too, who seems scary until the neighbors get to know him. And there's a video of how people make play balls.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.sub-title: An Eye Exam for Mister Rogers
programme.desc: At the eye doctor's office, Mister Rogers takes part in a general eye examination. The gorilla catches Lady Aberlin as she stumbles, which alarms Lady Elaine Fairchild. Lady Elaine is determined to catch the gorilla.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.sub-title: A Boy and His Service Dog
programme.desc: Mr. McFeely stops by with a film about a service dog aiding a handicapped child. Mister Rogers visits with the boy from the video and his dog. Lady Elaine Fairchile continues her efforts to catch the gorilla. Neighbor Aber is missing.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers reads a book about a dog named Zak. There's also a video visit to the Center for Creative Play, a place where children of all abilities can play.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Marilyn Barnett brings someone who has great talent with yo-yos. Mister Rogers shows a film of how people make wooden yo-yos. Prince Tuesday plays well with the yo-yo, but King Friday does not. Therefore, the king outlaws yo-yos.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.sub-title: Mister Rogers Rides In a Helicopter
programme.desc: Mister Rogers and Mr. McFeely ride with Maria Mancano on a helicopter. Miss Paulificate and Lady Aberlin have been assigned the duty of “yo-yo guard,” responsible for upholding the King's ban on yo-yos.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mr. McFeely shows a photo album with pictures of Neighbors wearing different hats. Lady Aberlin informs King Friday that Lady Elaine's helicopter, Yo-Yo, is stuck in the air. King Friday commands that all references to yo-yos be removed.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.sub-title: Musician Yo-Yo Ma and Inventor Chuck Hoberman
programme.desc: Mister Rogers shows a video of inventor Chuck Hoberman with his sphere and a video of Yo-Yo and Nicholas Ma. The neighbors are waiting for Bob Dog's helicopter to land. They discover that the helicopter responds to guitar music.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits Maya Lin at her studio to see how she first makes small models of big things she is working on. They go to Penn Station to see what she created there. In Make-Believe, there's a video visit with cellist Yo-Yo Ma.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers sees a performance by the Westminster Bell Choir and shows how people make bells. Mayor Maggie has a bell that she plays with King Friday and gives to Henrietta as a doorbell. Daniel and H.J. Elephant dress up as astronauts.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Visiting a nearby dance studio, Mister Rogers watches a class of young students learning to use ribbons as part of their dance routine. Henrietta is still ringing her new bell and X the Owl is growing quite frustrated.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Percussionist Tim Adams performs. H.J. Elephant is dressed in his outerspace costume as he tells Lady Aberlin about pretending to fly to the moon. He makes a loud trumpet sound which causes alarm for X and Henrietta.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers shows a video of himself and Sylvia Earle snorkeling in the ocean. Lady Elaine says she is hiding from something they are afraid of from outer space. Mister Rogers suggests when something is scary on TV, turn it off.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Neighbor Aber places a costume on top of Trolley to participate in the upcoming parade. Prince Tuesday is collecting comforting messages for X the Owl and Henrietta Pussycat in hopes of drawing them out for the parade.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers puts together a small fountain and shows a video of fountains around the world. King Friday gives a fountain to Westwood. Mayor Maggie searches for water for the fountain and is squirted by Lady Elaine Fairchilde.

programme.title: Wives With Knives
programme.desc: A bored teenager looking for trouble finds it after becoming pregnant. Heather finds stability with Terri, until she decides she needs more attention and loyalty, then things take a deadly turn.

programme.title: Wives With Knives

programme.title: Trace of Evil

programme.title: Trace of Evil

programme.title: Trace of Evil

programme.title: Trace of Evil
